headline: 今日AI速览：学术研究最活跃
narrative:
今日共收录250篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究159篇, 开源项目47篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API14篇。热门标签：Agent（60篇）。其中15%的文章有多来源交叉验证。

▸ Zackriya-Solutions /meetily：Privacy first, AI meeting assistant with 4x faster Parakeet/Whisper live transcription, speaker diar

▸ addyosmani /agent-skills：Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.

▸ asgeirtj /system_prompts_leaks：Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. Open

▸ TencentCloud /CubeSandbox：Instant, Concurrent, Secure & Lightweight Sandbox for AI Agents.
text: 今日共收录250篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究159篇, 开源项目47篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API14篇。热门标签：Agent（60篇）。其中15%的文章有多来源交叉验证。
